devdoc.details: Interface for ERC20 standard token interactions.
A liquidity pool contract enabling automated token swaps, liquidity provision, and share tracking.

addLiquidity(address,address,uint256,uin.details: Allows users to add liquidity to the pool.  Computes optimal share allocation based on Constant Product invariant mechanisms.

executeSwap(address,address,uint256,uint.details: Executes a peer-to-contract swap between two ERC20 tokens.

removeLiquidity(address,address,uint256).details: Removes liquidity from the pool by burning the specified LP shares. Reclaims original token values proportionally to the sender address.

withdrawToken(address,uint256).details: Emergency recovery routine allowing the platform owner to safely sweep pool components.
